bounded_tasks: A: Stop-proof sidecar contract (session_status, heartbeat, resume_prompt, v3 deliverables)
C: NAOTO OS <-> Nowpattern drift canonicalization

completion_definition: All 5 mandatory deliverables (session_status.json, heartbeat.json, task_result_v3.json, task_result_v3.md, resume_prompt.txt) exist, are UTF-8 clean, contain all required fields, and scope_completion_pct reflects bounded task completion. Production scripts are untouched.

scope_completion_pct.definition: Percentage of the bounded tasks assigned to this sidecar session that are complete.
scope_completion_pct.denominator: 4 bounded tasks (A: contract, B: semantics, C: drift, D: codex packet)
scope_completion_pct.when_100_means_100: All 5 deliverables exist with all required fields. No blocking_reason remains. No next_exact_step is pending within scope.

overall_completion_estimate_pct.definition: Estimated progress toward the full NAOTO OS / Nowpattern operational target: distribution_allowed_ratio >= 65%, all drift resolved, all IC items implemented in production.
overall_completion_estimate_pct.estimate_basis: distribution_allowed_ratio is 44.73% (target 65%). Sidecar has provided audit + action packet but Codex has not yet applied IC-1/IC-2/IC-3 changes. Drift items are documented but not yet fixed in source files. 14% = audit complete + contract established, implementation pending.

reached_100_pct_for_this_scope.definition: Boolean. True if and only if scope_completion_pct == 100 AND all deliverables pass validation.

findings.summary: 262 of 474 published posts are distribution_blocked (55.27%). All are release_lane=review_required. Zero truth_blocked.
findings.detail: IC-1: 196 dual-flag (WAR_CONFLICT+FINANCIAL_CRISIS). IC-2: 59 WAR_CONFLICT-only. IC-3: 4 FINANCIAL_CRISIS-only. Other: 3 empty risk_flags edge case.

findings.summary: article_release_manifest.json does NOT contain external_url_count, verified_external_source_count, title, html, or plaintext fields.
findings.detail: IC-1 estimated_rescue_count and IC-3 external_url_count fallback cannot be precisely quantified from manifest alone. Codex must re-derive from Ghost post data during implementation.

findings.summary: v1 deliverables had mojibake in 2 files (task_result.json L88, task_result.md L96). All 6 source .py files are clean. v2/v3 use ASCII hex descriptions only.

All checks passing (ok=true). prediction_deploy_gate ok, ecosystem_governance_audit 20/20, synthetic_user_crawler 4/4, site_ui_smoke_audit 28/28, playwright_e2e 36/36, check_live_repo_drift all match.
Prior sessions had no machine-readable progress tracking. If Claude Code stopped mid-task, Codex had no way to know what was done vs pending.
findings.detail: v3 introduces session_status.json (running/blocked/completed + pct), heartbeat.json (per-phase), resume_prompt.txt (restart instructions).

canonical_definition.NAOTO_OS: The operating system. Founder OS. The intelligence and execution layer that governs all projects.
canonical_definition.Nowpattern: The primary project under NAOTO OS. A verifiable forecast platform (nowpattern.com).
canonical_definition.relationship: NAOTO OS contains Nowpattern. Nowpattern is not the OS itself.

naoto_os_nowpattern_drift.drift_observed: Some docs use 'Nowpattern' as if it were the OS name. NORTH_STAR.md mixes mission-level OS language with Nowpattern-specific platform language.
naoto_os_nowpattern_drift.authoritative_source: scripts/mission_contract.py: founder_os.canonical_name = 'NAOTO OS', north_star = 'Nowpattern is a verifiable forecast platform.'
naoto_os_nowpattern_drift.codex_action: No code change needed. Docs clarification only.

canonical_definition.stale_reason: 0.1780 is VPS live subset (n=7). 0.1828 is stale stats snapshot. Neither is the canonical value.

naoto_os_nowpattern_drift.drift_observed: Three different Brier averages appear in different docs/reports. Only 0.4759 (binary, n=53) is canonical.
naoto_os_nowpattern_drift.codex_action: No code change. Remove stale values from any docs that cite 0.1780 or 0.1828.

naoto_os_nowpattern_drift.drift_observed: NORTH_STAR.md PVQE table says V = '改善速度' (improvement speed). OPERATING_PRINCIPLES.md PVQE table says V = '改善速度'. mission_contract.py says V = '価値密度' (value density).
naoto_os_nowpattern_drift.codex_action: Update NORTH_STAR.md and OPERATING_PRINCIPLES.md PVQE tables: V = '価値密度' (not '改善速度'). This is a docs-only fix.

canonical_definition.rule: Public UI and public explanation text must use only vocabulary from canonical_public_lexicon.py. Internal docs may use extended vocabulary.

naoto_os_nowpattern_drift.drift_observed: No active public-facing wording violations detected in this audit scope. Lexicon shims (public_lexicon.py, product_lexicon.py) correctly forward to canonical source.

codex_action_packet.title: IC-1: Relax dual-flag verified_count threshold from >= 2 to >= 1
codex_action_packet.why_now: 196 posts (41% of all published) are blocked solely because dual AUTO_SAFE flags require verified_count >= 2. Most have 0-1 verified sources. This is the single largest blocker preventing distribution_allowed_ratio from reaching 65%.
codex_action_packet.risk: low — editorial_review_advised still flags posts for human review while allowing distribution
codex_action_packet.done_definition: After regenerating manifest: distribution_allowed_ratio_pct >= 60% AND truth_blocked == 0 AND all 196 IC-1 slugs have release_lane in (auto_safe, editorial_review_advised).

codex_action_packet.title: IC-3: Add external_url_count >= 2 fallback for single-flag posts
codex_action_packet.why_now: 4 FINANCIAL_CRISIS-only posts (all crypto, all lang-ja) are blocked by verified_count < 1 with no fallback. Adding external_url_count check provides a low-risk escape hatch.
codex_action_packet.risk: low — external_url_count is already computed during manifest generation
codex_action_packet.done_definition: After regenerating manifest: these 4 slugs have release_lane = editorial_review_advised AND distribution_allowed = true.

codex_action_packet.title: IC-2: Narrow WAR_CONFLICT regex to compound phrases
codex_action_packet.why_now: 59 WAR_CONFLICT-only posts are blocked. The regex at L45-52 fires on bare keywords (military, conflict, sanction) hitting 96% of geopolitics articles. Compound phrases would reduce false positives.
codex_action_packet.risk: medium — false negatives possible if regex is too narrow. Requires before/after comparison of all 474 posts.
codex_action_packet.done_definition: After regenerating manifest: WAR_CONFLICT flag count drops by >= 30% AND no new truth_blocked posts AND distribution_allowed_ratio >= 70%.

codex_action_packet.title: Fix empty risk_flags edge case in classify_release_lane
codex_action_packet.why_now: 3 posts have risk_flags=[] but get EDITOR_REVIEW_REQUIRED: (empty) error. This is a logic gap in classify_release_lane.
codex_action_packet.risk: low — guard against empty risk_flags before injecting EDITOR_REVIEW_REQUIRED
codex_action_packet.done_definition: After regenerating manifest: these 3 slugs have distribution_allowed = true AND release_errors is empty.

codex_action_packet.title: DRIFT-03: Fix PVQE V definition in NORTH_STAR.md and OPERATING_PRINCIPLES.md
codex_action_packet.why_now: V is defined as '改善速度' in two principle docs but mission_contract.py (authoritative) says '価値密度'. This inconsistency can mislead agents reading principle docs without also reading mission_contract.py.
codex_action_packet.expected_impact: docs-only — no runtime impact, but prevents vocabulary drift propagation
codex_action_packet.risk: low — text-only change in clearly defined fields
codex_action_packet.done_definition: Both files have V = '価値密度' in PVQE table. lexicon_contract_audit.py passes.

stop_proof_contract.description: This contract defines 4 mandatory files that any sidecar session must maintain to be resume-safe.

session_status.update_frequency: At session start, at each phase boundary, at session end or interruption

resume_prompt.purpose: Shortest possible prompt for next Claude Code or Codex to pick up exactly where this session left off

invariants: session_status.json is ALWAYS written BEFORE any other work in a phase
heartbeat.json is ALWAYS written at phase completion BEFORE moving to next phase
If session is about to stop (context limit, error, user interrupt), update session_status.json with status=blocked, blocking_reason, and next_exact_step BEFORE stopping
Silent stops are prohibited. blocking_reason and next_exact_step must always be populated on non-completed stops
resume_prompt.txt is written at session end regardless of completion status
Production scripts listed in edit-prohibited set are never modified
